title: Vanilla Loot+
description: Tierd of boring loot? This data pack adds over 12 unique items to that are each found in different loot tables.
body:
Are you _tired_ of the _same_ boring loot? Well look no further as **Vanilla Loot+** is here to help! Adding **9 new vanilla friendly items** using data components adds a fresh feel to loot tables adding informative tooltips removing the hassle of learning what every item does. You can also view the wiki below for more info on each item. ## Key Features - Adds 9 new unique items and 1 new unique armor set that are each found in different loot tables that make the items unique to its area.
Loot Tables with a Unique Item - Abandoned Mineshaft - Simple Dungeon - Stronghold Corridor - Stronghold Crossing - Stronghold Library - Buried Treasure - Desert Pyramid - Jungle Temple - Pillager Outpost - Woodland Mansion
## Installation Decide if you want to download the pack as a pure data pack or packaged as a mod. Put the pure data pack .zip file into the datapacks folder of your Minecraft world, or the mod into your .minecraft/mods folder. # Wiki
Shrink Ray
### Info - Shrinks the user to half height when held in the off hand. ### Where to Find - Spawns in any chest in a abandoned mineshaft.
Blood Armor Set
### Info - The blood of past users increases your health. - Helmets and Boots increase your health by 2 hearts each. - Chestplates and Leggings increase your health by 3 hearts each. ### Where to Find - A random armor piece spawns in any chest in a simple dungeon.
Knockback Stick
### Info - Knockback XX ### Where to Find - Spawns in any chest in a stronghold corridor.
Hot Coal
### Info - Fire Aspect V ### Where to Find - Spawns in any chest in a stronghold crossing.
Librarians Boots
### Info - Shhhh be quiet! - Sneaking speed = Walking Speed ### Where to Find - Spawns in any chest in a stronghold library.
Fishermen Book
### Info - Luck of the Sea III - Lure III - Unbreaking III ### Where to Find - Spawns in any buried treasure chest.
Sandy Bottle
### Info - The dense sand is hides you and particles well but the sand impares your vision. - Blindness I for 45 seconds - Invisibility I for 45 seconds ### Where to Find - Spawns in any chest in a desert pyramid.
Foot of Reaching
### Info - The strange shape of this foot allows you to reach 2 blocks farther when held in the off hand. ### Where to Find - Spawns in any chest in a jungle temple.
Quickbow
### Info - The hyper elastic strings allow instant ammo loading. ### Where to Find - Spawns in any chest in a pillager outpost.
Mars Helmet
### Info - Gives mars gravity and greatly decreases fall damage when worn. ### Where to Find - Spawns in any chest in a woodland mansion.
